name: Search Hub
description: AI-powered search interface with semantic results, filters, and highlighting. Provides intelligent search across knowledge base content.

page_briefs.search: Full-page search experience. A prominent command palette search bar sits at the top, accepting natural language queries. Below it, a filter bar allows narrowing results by category, date, content type, and tags. The main area displays ranked search results with AI-generated summaries, highlighted matching terms, and relevance scores. A sidebar provides faceted navigation and saved search history.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar with faceted navigation and main content area for search results
